stemHtml: An aircraft is climbing when the crew receives an ACAS Resolution Advisory to descend. The RA must be followed immediately because the ACAS system assumes…

options.a: Your response will be correct and timely.
options.b: A timely response from the other aircraft in the opposite direction to their RA.
options.c: A response within 1 second from the other aircraft in the opposite direction to their RA.
options.d: Your response will be correct and within 1 second.
